title: galium humilioides
intro: Galium humilioides, also known as Humility Galium, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Galium humilioides include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Galium humilioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
